name: Coding Benchmarks
description: Small coding tasks relevant to vibe-coding workflows.

tests.name: Python Palindrome Function
tests.prompt: Write a Python function to check if a string is a palindrome. Include two examples.

tests.name: JavaScript Bug Explanation
tests.prompt: Find the bug and provide a fixed version:\nfunction sum(arr) { return arr.reduce((a,b) => a+b); }\nsum([1,2,"3"])

tests.name: SQL Duplicate Emails
tests.prompt: Write a SQL query to find duplicate emails in a users table.
